news.title: Massive Influx of Refurbished iPhone 16 Pros
news.title_cn: iPhone 16 Pro 翻新机大量到货
news.summary: Grade A iPhone 16 Pro Max units are now flooding the 2nd and 3rd floors. Wholesale prices have dropped 15% this month. Check battery cycles – some units have under 10 cycles.
news.tip: 💡 Luc's Tip: Always verify battery cycle count via settings.

news.title: New 'Ultra-Thin Hard OLED' Screens for iPhone 15/16
news.title_cn: iPhone 15/16 超薄硬性OLED屏幕上市
news.summary: Shenzhen manufacturers have launched a new generation of compatible OLED screens that match original brightness at one-third the cost. Avoid cheaper 'In-cell' screens – they drain 20% more battery.
news.tip: 🔧 Repair shops: Hard OLED is the best value right now.

news.title: Logistics Alert: Stricter Battery Shipping Rules
news.title_cn: 物流提醒：锂电池运输新规
news.summary: Shenzhen Airport (SZX) now requires special battery lines for packages containing more than two phones with built-in batteries. Delivery to Europe/Canada now takes 5-9 days (up from 5). Consolidate orders to optimize DG costs.
news.tip: 📌 Plan ahead for bulk phone shipments.

news.title: Samsung S24 Ultra Prices Drop $120
news.title_cn: 三星S24 Ultra 价格下跌120美元
news.summary: Grade A+ refurbished Galaxy S24 Ultra units have fallen by $120 in 30 days due to surplus stock from Korea and the US. Now is the best time to source high-end Android.

news.title: AirPods 'PodsPro 3' with Touchscreen Cases Arrive
news.summary: New AirPods-style earbuds with LCD touchscreen charging cases are flooding the 1st floor. Control ANC, EQ, and find your buds without the phone. Quality varies – we only source models with Airoha 1562F chip for true -35dB ANC.
news.tip: 🎵 Always test ANC in a noisy environment before buying.

news.title: MacBook Air M2/M3 Surplus – Prices Drop 20%
news.title_cn: MacBook Air M2/M3 过剩 价格下跌20%
news.summary: Corporate fleet refreshes in Shenzhen have flooded the 3rd floor with MacBook Air M2/M3 units. Grade A M2 models are down 20% – best value for export. Most are 8GB/256GB; 16GB versions are starting to appear.
news.tip: 🔋 Insist on battery cycles under 150 for client orders.
